author: misilva73
content:
I opened an [PR](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11807) to update the 8037 EIP. It includes the proposal from Gary on the CREATe charging and the source-based reservoir refill. 

I would be great to get your comments today, so that we can merge this is starting closing the spec for glamsterdam-devnet-6

author: spencer_tb
content: Should https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11778 be closed if we go with source based refunding?
